input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.3.4.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.3.4.1
            TITLE: the vehicle must have a brake light that is clearly visible from the rear in very bright sunlight.

            CONTENT:
            rule T.3.4.1: The vehicle must have a Brake Light that is clearly visible from the rear in very bright sunlight.
T.3.4.1 The vehicle must have a Brake Light that is clearly visible from the rear in very bright sunlight.

final_answer: The vehicle must have a Brake Light that is clearly visible from the rear in very bright sunlight.
